source.reference: APG G7 BC=0.158 (SS109 62gr, alternate proof lot from M855/ARL-TR-5182 silton & Howell 2010). Slightly higher BC than standard M855 (0.151) per lot variation documented in BRL testing.
source.methodology: Values sourced from US Army Ballistic Research Laboratory (BRL) / Armament Research, Development and Engineering Center (ARDEC) published reports, Doppler radar measurements, or SAAMI/CIP/NATO EPVAT test data.
